questionText: Which artist recorded an entire album in a closet that went on to sell 40 million copies?
correctAnswer: Billie Eilish (When We All Fall Asleep, Where Do We Go?)
options: Billie Eilish (When We All Fall Asleep, Where Do We Go?)
funFact: Billie and Finneas recorded the album in his tiny childhood bedroom — the Grammy-winning debut was made on a $200 audio interface

questionText: Which country is Miriam Makeba from?
funFact: Miriam Makeba was called 'Mama Africa' — she was exiled for 30 years and her South African citizenship was revoked for opposing apartheid

questionText: Who is the lead guitarist of Aerosmith?
funFact: Joe Perry and Steven Tyler are called the 'Toxic Twins' — their drug-fueled rivalry nearly destroyed the band in the 1980s before their comeback with Run-DMC

questionText: Which Martin Scorsese film opens with 'Be My Baby' by The Ronettes?
funFact: Scorsese said the opening of Mean Streets — Harvey Keitel waking up to 'Be My Baby' — was autobiographical. The song represents his own Little Italy childhood

questionText: Which TV series features 'Nara' by alt-J in a key scene?
funFact: alt-J's music has been used in over 20 TV series — their atmospheric sound is perfect for sci-fi and mystery shows that need an otherworldly feeling

questionText: Which country is Tommy Seebach from?
funFact: Tommy Seebach represented Denmark at Eurovision THREE times and became a national icon — his son Rasmus Seebach later became Denmark's biggest pop star

questionText: Which classical composer was famously only 35 when he died?
funFact: Mozart composed over 600 works before dying at 35 — his final work, the Requiem, was left unfinished. He was buried in a common grave in Vienna

questionText: Who is the guitarist of Vampire Weekend?
funFact: Ezra Koenig is a Columbia University graduate who started Vampire Weekend as a campus band — they became the first indie band to debut at #1 on Billboard since 2008

questionText: Which Pedro Almodóvar film features 'Cucurrucucú Paloma' by Caetano Veloso?
funFact: Caetano Veloso performs the song live on screen in the film — Almodóvar called it one of the most beautiful scenes he ever directed

questionText: Which TV series features 'You Make My Dreams' by Hall & Oates in a memorable dance scene?
correctAnswer: 500 Days of Summer (film, not TV) — but Scrubs and The O.C. featured it prominently
options: 500 Days of Summer (film, not TV) — but Scrubs and The O.C. featured it prominently
funFact: Hall & Oates are the best-selling music duo of all time — bigger than Simon & Garfunkel, the Everly Brothers, or any other duo in history
